overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character walking along abandoned railway tracks through a dense forest at night. The character carries weapons on their back and navigates around a stationary train car blocking the tracks before continuing through the wooded corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned railway corridor through dense coniferous forest

events.description: abandoned train car becomes visible in the distance down the tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railway tracks through the dark forest, weapons and backpack visible

entered.detail: metal rails with wooden ties and gravel ballast stretching into the distance
tall dense pine trees lining both sides of the tracks
tall dense pine trees lining both sides of the tracks
rusted red boxcar blocking the railway tracks ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along abandoned railway tracks through a narrow corridor of dense coniferous forest at night. The cool blue moonlight filters through the trees as the character approaches, and an abandoned red train car becomes visible in the distance blocking the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest edge beside railway with abandoned train car obstruction

events.description: character steps off the railway tracks to the right to navigate around the train car
character moves back toward the railway tracks after passing the train car

agents.ego_description: leaving the tracks to walk through tall grass and vegetation around the right side of the abandoned train car

entered.detail: uneven ground with tall grass and weeds alongside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the gravel tracks and walks through tall grass to navigate around the abandoned train car blocking the path. The rusted red boxcar sits stationary on the tracks, forcing a detour through the forest edge before returning to the railway.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned railway corridor continuing through forest

events.description: character steps back onto the railway tracks and resumes walking along them

agents.ego_description: walking along the tracks again continuing through the forest, occasionally looking around the environment

segments.scene_description: Having passed the obstacle, the character returns to the gravel tracks and continues walking along the railway corridor through the dark forest. The tracks stretch ahead into the distance flanked by dense coniferous trees under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along abandoned railway tracks that leads the character through a detour around a rusted obstacle back into the depths of a dark forest. It begins with the character walking along gravel tracks through a narrow corridor of coniferous trees, where cool blue moonlight filters through the canopy toward a red train car blocking the path. As the character reaches the obstruction, the camera moves off the tracks and through tall grass to navigate around the stationary rusted boxcar at the forest's edge. The scene then shifts back to the railway as the character returns to the gravel path, leaving the train car behind. Finally, the camera continues forward as the tracks stretch ahead into the distance, flanked by the dense, dark woods under the night sky.
